wavesPolicy: Phase 1 hexes are released in waves. Cells with status 'available' are open for reservation; cells flagged 'upcoming' render in a muted blue and are not yet purchasable. All externally sold cells default to 'available' in this seed; flip individual cells to 'upcoming' to stage wave rollouts.

statusVocabulary.available: Open for reservation in the current wave
statusVocabulary.upcoming: Phase 1 hex held back for a future wave; not yet purchasable
statusVocabulary.reserved: Purchased by an external operator; awaiting hardware boot
statusVocabulary.reserved-founding: Held by the Malama Labs founding team for internal testing; not for sale
statusVocabulary.activated: Hardware booted, registered on chain, generating signed data
statusVocabulary.restricted: Sales prohibited in this jurisdiction per Terms §25; rendered as non-interactive

urban.description: Dense city core; high coverage saturation

wild.description: Sparse coverage; frontier and high-climate-value terrain
